name: OPOD: On-Policy Omni Distillation

description: arXiv:2607.20918v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Omni-modal models can handle text, images, and audio in one system, but improving all of these abilities together remains difficult. Training a single model on pooled multimodal data often fails to match models specialized for individual modalities. On-policy distillation (OPD) offers a way to combine such specialists: the student generates a resp...
author: Tong Zhao, Yuyang Hu, Reed Li, Yu Lu, Haibo Shi, Yutao Zhu, Zhicheng Dou
